title: VanillaDeathChest
description: Places containers when players die that contain their items.
body: The description can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/TheRandomLabs/VanillaDeathChest/tree/1.16-fabric#vanilladeathchest-fabric). The Fabric version of VanillaDeathChest requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## Support my work If you'd like to support my work, I've got a [Patreon](https://patreon.com/therandomlabs)! Feel free to check it out. 😛 Special thanks to [kreezxil](https://github.com/kreezxil) for supporting my work! ## Sponsor I've partnered with Apex Hosting! In my experience, their servers are lag-free, easy to manage, and of high quality. Check them out here:
